tasks.subject: Task 1: Add mobile drawer for tutorial nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sidebar collapses on mobile into a slide-in drawer triggered from a sticky top bar; desktop layout is byte-identical above `lg:`.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/TutorialNavMobile.tsx`
- Modify: `app/t/[slug]/layout.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/TutorialNavMobile.tsx", "app/t/[slug]/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sticky top bar visible < 1024px with All tutorials link + Contents button", "Contents button opens left-slide drawer with TutorialNav inside", "Drawer closes on backdrop tap, ESC, and link tap", "Above 1024px: no mobile bar, sidebar unchanged at 16rem", "Body scroll locked while drawer open", "npm run build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Offset quiz progress bar below mobile trigger
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Quiz page's sticky progress bar no longer collides with the new mobile trigger bar; desktop position unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: `components/Quiz.tsx:134`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/Quiz.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev (manual browser check)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Below lg: progress bar at top-12, no overlap with trigger bar", "Above lg: progress bar at top-0, unchanged from baseline"]}
```
